channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Colorado GOP gubernatorial candidate retracts disputed claim about Venezuelan gang presence after public questioning
item.description: A Republican candidate running for governor in Colorado, Scott Bottoms, faced public scrutiny after making and then retracting a claim regarding alleged Venezuelan gang activity in the state. During a...

item.title: Theker raises $85M to develop modular general-purpose factory robots
item.description: The Barcelona-based robotics startup Theker has raised $85 million in a Series A funding round aimed at scaling its development of highly adaptable factory robots designed to operate across multiple i...

item.title: Jen Psaki discusses polling trends showing declining approval and voter dissatisfaction with Trump’s coalition
item.description: In a recent MS NOW segment, commentator Jen Psaki argued that President Donald Trump’s political coalition is experiencing growing voter dissatisfaction, describing it as a “buyer’s remorse era.” She ...

item.title: Early 20th Century Advertising for Fountain Pens and Ink Brands
item.description: This article presents a curated collection of vintage advertisements for fountain pens and inks from the early 20th century, roughly spanning the 1900s through the 1930s. During this period, fountain ...

item.title: Watchdog Says DOJ Civil Division Found No Records Related to Trump IRS Settlement and $1.8 Billion Fund

item.title: Ex Ukonga Prison Superintendent Appears in Court Over Allegations of Conduct

item.title: Nancy Mace Says She Will Oppose Trump After Losing South Carolina Governor Primary

item.title: Tony Schwartz says Trump is struggling to maintain focus amid escalating political controversies

item.title: Analyst Criticizes Mike Johnson for Suggesting Future Changes to Social Security Programs

item.title: Australian travellers increasingly explore regional Japan beyond Tokyo, Kyoto and Osaka
item.description: The article examines how travel patterns among Australian visitors to Japan are evolving. While Tokyo, Kyoto, Osaka and Mount Fuji remain popular entry points for first-time visitors, many returning t...

item.title: Chase Sapphire Preferred Card Updates Add New Rewards and Credits While Reducing Hyatt Transfer Value

item.title: Microsoft to restrict Office 2019 for Mac to read-only mode starting July 13 due to expired certificate
item.description: Microsoft will begin restricting functionality in Office 2019 for Mac starting July 13, 2026, effectively preventing users from editing, saving, or creating new documents in key applications such as W...

item.title: Exploring Melbourne’s Laksa Scene: Regional Styles, Cultural Origins and Where to Try Them
item.description: This article explores Melbourne’s growing appreciation for laksa, a diverse family of noodle soups originating from Malaysia, Singapore and Indonesia. While there are many regional variations, curry l...
